shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' src/utils/compute-positions.ts && sed -n '1,280p' src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx && sed -n '400,555p' src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx && sed -n '1,220p' src/test/utils.spec.js"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"tooltipArrowStyles|computeTooltipPosition|react-tooltip__place|__place|className\" src/test src | head -300 && sed -n '1,180p' src/components/Tooltip/styles.module.css && sed -n '1,130p' src/utils/compute-positions-types.d.ts && cat package.json"
/bin/bash -lc 'git status --short && git log -8 --oneline -- src/utils/compute-positions.ts src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx && git remote -v'
/bin/bash -lc "git branch --show-current && git tag --contains HEAD | head && git log --all --oneline --grep='placement\\|computed position\\|flip' -i | head -30"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,95p' src/components/Tooltip/TooltipTypes.d.ts && rg -n \"type PlacesType|PlacesType\" src/components src | head -40"

/bin/bash -lc 'node_modules/.bin/prettier --config ./.prettierrc.json --write src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx src/utils/compute-positions.ts src/test/utils.spec.js && git diff --check && node_modules/.bin/jest src/test/utils.spec.js --runInBand'
/bin/bash -lc "git diff --check && git status --short && git diff --stat && node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit --pretty false 2>&1 | rg 'src/|error TS' | tail -20"
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "react-tooltip resolved placement CSS class auto flip"'

/bin/bash -lc "nmem --json m add \"react-tooltip now exposes Floating UI's resolved placement from computeTooltipPosition and stores it in Tooltip state. The tooltip root renders react-tooltip__place-<placement>, initialized from the requested place and updated after every successful position recomputation, including auto-flips, anchor changes, and content/size recalculation.\" -t \"react-tooltip exposes resolved placement class\" --unit-type decision -l react-tooltip -s codex -i 0.8"
